title: 桑提克
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2025/11/3/839022.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1920/50364/842288/2025/11/3/956783.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"桑提克"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者桑提克，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"出身于奥芙里斯西部开拓区，是活跃于地下流鬼中的地下金属摇滚小子，超人气的贝斯手，也是一个癫狂的杀手。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"桑提克肆意而狂暴的音乐风格，极受流鬼和粉丝们追捧，但在粉丝们看来，桑提克总是独来独往，对摇滚以外的一切人或事表现都极其淡漠，唯独触碰贝斯时才会爆发出骇人的癫狂。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他一旦开始演奏，便会彻底沉迷于癫狂的摇滚中不可自拔，追求极致痛感与音色炸裂的融合，会用持续暴虐的拨弦逼迫肉身至极限，在失控边缘即兴出扭曲旋律。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"深信「死亡是唯一不跑调的和弦」，用自毁式表演嘲讽生命，将观众的惊惧尖叫视为最高赞美。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但在舞台之外，也常有人能看到有流浪猫、流浪狗跟随在他身边。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他是音浪的暴君，但在他内心深处，也藏着不为人知的柔软和弦。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"理"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/10/12/754552.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"踯躅街"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"恶灵摇滚"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"男"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"摇滚乐手"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"/"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13653ada819cf","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"ReA芯片状态"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"正常"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":130,"height":184},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2025/11/3/950184.jpg"]}},{"key":"0.216db13 impleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"桑提克是以暴击为核心的辅助型异格者,专属被动能够在任意友方异格者造成暴击时使其基于伤害恢复一定生命,并使所有友方异格者暴击伤害提升。二技能可使敌方所有异格者以及智壳技能冷却增加,并附加【暴击率下降】以及【效果命中下降】;大招能为全体友方净化减益效果,附加【暴击率上升】及【暴击伤害上升】,并立即获得行动回合。在长线战斗中能在提升续航的同时,不断提升友方单位造成的伤害。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.9b83c449d615b","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"8疾驰+12浴血之躯+6讯光天击"}]}]}},{"key":"0.d2f840c667c1e8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"天角兽"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/11/3/351260.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
